mapper.sql: SELECT A.line_id,B.line_name,A.stage_id,C.stage_name,A.process_id,D.process_name,A.mac_id,A.mac_name,A.mac_area,A.`status`,A.remark,A.create_by,A.create_time,A.update_by,A.update_time FROM mes_mac A LEFT JOIN mes_line B ON B.line_id = A.line_id LEFT JOIN mes_stage C ON C.stage_id = A.stage_id LEFT JOIN mes_process D ON D.process_id = A.process_id
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT A.line_id,B.line_name,A.mac_name,A.`status` FROM mes_mac A LEFT JOIN mes_line B ON B.line_id = A.line_id
A.del_flag = '0' and A.mac_name like concat('%', #{macName}, '%')

SELECT DISTINCT A.stage_id,C.stage_name,A.mac_name,A.`status` FROM mes_mac A LEFT JOIN mes_line B ON B.line_id = A.line_id LEFT JOIN mes_stage C ON C.stage_id = A.stage_id
A.del_flag = '0' and A.mac_name like concat('%', #{macName}, '%') and A.line_id = #{lineId}

SELECT DISTINCT A.process_id,D.process_name,A.mac_name,A.mac_area,A.`status` FROM mes_mac A LEFT JOIN mes_line B ON B.line_id = A.line_id LEFT JOIN mes_stage C ON C.stage_id = A.stage_id LEFT JOIN mes_process D ON D.process_id = A.process_id
A.del_flag = '0' and A.mac_name like concat('%', #{macName}, '%') and A.line_id = #{lineId} and A.stage_id = #{stageId}
mapper.insert:
insert into mes_mac
line_id, stage_id, process_id, mac_name, mac_area, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{lineId}, #{stageId}, #{processId}, #{macName}, #{macArea}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete: update mes_mac set del_flag = '2' where mac_id = #{macId}

update mes_mac set del_flag = '2' where mac_id in
#{macId}
